title: polypodium spathulatum
intro: Polypodium spathulatum, also known as western polypody or sword fern polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and ease respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Polypodium spathulatum is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes, with the dried fronds being used in herbal preparations.
